{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"2026032122483060FC09DF8A4F912EA36C\"}"},"total":29},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7401321218329805630","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"第四本，这是我读的第四本电子版，山海经一直是我很喜欢的书籍，虽然总有人称山海经为食谱…[捂脸]","text_exts":[{"e":19,"s":16,"text":"山海经","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44\u0026hyperlink_type=quote_book\u0026directQueryWord=%E5%B1%B1%E6%B5%B7%E7%BB%8F\u0026directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774104510912EA36C%230%23%23\u0026directTabType=0\u0026reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227401321218329805630%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227102339605348748295%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%B1%B1%E6%B5%B7%E7%BB%8F%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D\u0026halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1723258175,"group_id":"7102339605348748295","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我是一个女的！女的！货真价实的女孩子！虽然我不知道为什么，但麻烦认错的人来看一下简介，也请不要有人再认错了。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4EQ5nj4zr5vhoSg7finM58=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/84f2f5c7f8224a78ba818e8115b70ad7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776624286\u0026x-signature=Y6WMS4xyTRRpQx4Pl6OW1uTZ8co%3D","user_id":"223911652637341","user_name":"公子苏辞玖"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"223911652637341","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{\"title_name\":\"作家\",\"title_id\":\"author\"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{\"title_text\":\"作家\",\"title_default_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"title_dark_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"bg_default_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#FF9F31\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#FFB95C\\\"}\",\"bg_dark_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#CC8029\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#CC9349\\\"}\",\"title_dark_diaphaneity\":\"CC\"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7102339605348748295","book_info":{"abstract":"本书对目前现存的10余个《山海经》图画刻本进行搜集、整理，从其7个刻本的千余幅图中选出150余幅图画，按《山海经》十八卷经文的顺序，介绍了南山经、西山经、北山经、东山经、中山经5大山系，海外经、海内经、大荒经3大海经中的异禽神兽、奇国异人等。在每幅图下，有解说文字。此部分，作者查阅了《博物志》《淮南子》《神异经》《边裔典》《玄中记》《大唐西域记》等百余种古典文献，追本溯源，力求为《山海经》中的人神异兽正名。图书以图为主，解说为辅，希望能给读者提供一部见诸于古代珍本，有鉴赏、收藏和学术研究价值的《山海经》图本。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/b9da32c59ccc631d2e800dfa4d317704~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"林屋公子,凤妩
